requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（SEC + NCh/IEC 60598）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（SEC + NCh/IEC 60598）

summary.en: LED luminaires sold in Chile must obtain SEC (Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles) mandatory product certification for electrical safety before being marketed. Safety is assessed against the IEC 60598 series (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests, plus relevant Part 2 sections) adopted as Chilean NCh standards by INN. Requirements cover protection against electric shock (creepage and clearance, insulation resistance, touch current), thermal endurance, mechanical strength, and terminals — consistent with the international IEC 60598 base. The product is certified by an SEC-authorized certification body using test reports from an SEC-accepted laboratory; once certified, the product carries the SEC seal and is entered in the SEC registry. Chile operates at 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase, so products designed for 220 V/50 V China single-phase mains share the same frequency and a similar single-phase nominal voltage, easing electrical design alignment.
summary.zh: 在智利销售的 LED 灯具须在上市前取得 SEC（电力与燃料监管局）强制性产品电气安全认证。安全依据由 INN 采纳为智利 NCh 标准的 IEC 60598 系列（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验，及相关第 2 部分）评估。要求涵盖防触电（爬电距离与电气间隙、绝缘电阻、接触电流）、热耐久性、机械强度及端子——与国际 IEC 60598 基础一致。产品由 SEC 授权认证机构使用 SEC 接受实验室的检测报告认证；认证后产品带有 SEC 认证标志并录入 SEC 注册。智利采用 220 V、50 Hz 单相，故为中国单相 220 V 市电设计的产品共用相同频率及相近的单相标称电压，有助于电气设计对齐。
summary.zht: 在智利銷售的 LED 燈具須在上市前取得 SEC（電力與燃料監管局）強制性產品電氣安全認證。安全依據由 INN 採納為智利 NCh 標準的 IEC 60598 系列（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗，及相關第 2 部分）評估。要求涵蓋防觸電（爬電距離與電氣間隙、絕緣電阻、接觸電流）、熱耐久性、機械強度及端子——與國際 IEC 60598 基礎一致。產品由 SEC 授權認證機構使用 SEC 接受實驗室的檢測報告認證；認證後產品帶有 SEC 認證標誌並錄入 SEC 注冊。智利採用 220 V、50 Hz 單相，故為中國單相 220 V 市電設計的產品共用相同頻率及相近的單相標稱電壓，有助於電氣設計對齊。

standards_or_laws: SEC mandatory product certification regime (Chile — electrical safety certification + SEC seal)
IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (adopted as NCh by INN)

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026. Both editions are based on IEC 60598-1. CCC obligations for in-scope luminaires are governed by the applicable CNCA rules (CNCA-C10-01) rather than by the GB/T designation alone, and CCC testing is conducted at CNCA-authorized laboratories. The CCC conformity assessment process and documentation are specific to the Chinese regime.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015。两版均以 IEC 60598-1 为基础。范围内灯具的 CCC 义务由适用的 CNCA 规则（CNCA-C10-01）决定，而非仅由 GB/T 标识决定，CCC 检测在 CNCA 授权实验室进行。CCC 合格评定流程及文件针对中国制度。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015。兩版均以 IEC 60598-1 為基礎。範圍內燈具的 CCC 義務由適用的 CNCA 規則（CNCA-C10-01）決定，而非僅由 GB/T 標識決定，CCC 檢測在 CNCA 授權實驗室進行。CCC 合格評定流程及文件針對中國制度。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; based on IEC 60598-1)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Both the Chilean NCh adoption of IEC 60598 and China's GB/T 7000.1 derive from the same IEC 60598-1 base, so the technical safety content is largely harmonised and the shared 220 V single-phase / 50 Hz environment eases electrical design transfer. The gap is process and jurisdiction: SEC certification must be performed by an SEC-authorized body and the product entered in the SEC registry before lawful sale; Chinese CCC certificates and GB/T 7000.1 reports are not directly transferable to the Chilean SEC file, though the common IEC test physics can reduce re-testing where the SEC certifier accepts the report basis. A Chilean importer/local representative is typically needed to place the product on the market. Manufacturers should confirm the exact NCh edition of IEC 60598 in force and which Part 2 section applies to their luminaire type.
gap.zh: 智利对 IEC 60598 的 NCh 采纳与中国 GB/T 7000.1 同源自 IEC 60598-1，故技术安全内容基本协调，且共用的 220 V 单相 / 50 Hz 环境有助于电气设计转移。差距在于流程与司法管辖：SEC 认证须由 SEC 授权机构进行，且产品须在合法销售前录入 SEC 注册；中国 CCC 证书及 GB/T 7000.1 报告不可直接转用于智利 SEC 档案，但在 SEC 认证机构接受报告基础时，共用 IEC 检测物理基础可减少重新检测。通常需要智利进口商/本地代表将产品投放市场。制造商应确认现行 IEC 60598 的确切 NCh 版本及适用于其灯具类型的第 2 部分章节。
gap.zht: 智利對 IEC 60598 的 NCh 採納與中國 GB/T 7000.1 同源自 IEC 60598-1，故技術安全內容基本協調，且共用的 220 V 單相 / 50 Hz 環境有助於電氣設計轉移。差距在於流程與司法管轄：SEC 認證須由 SEC 授權機構進行，且產品須在合法銷售前錄入 SEC 注冊；中國 CCC 證書及 GB/T 7000.1 報告不可直接轉用於智利 SEC 檔案，但在 SEC 認證機構接受報告基礎時，共用 IEC 檢測物理基礎可減少重新檢測。通常需要智利進口商/本地代表將產品投放市場。製造商應確認現行 IEC 60598 的確切 NCh 版本及適用於其燈具類型的第 2 部分章節。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SEC product certification (electrical safety) against NCh/IEC 60598 required before lawful sale in Chile; SEC seal and registry entry required
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where within CNCA-C10-01 scope; general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires require SEC mandatory product certification for electrical safety against NCh/IEC 60598 before lawful sale in Chile, with the SEC seal and SEC registry entry. The IEC 60598-1 base is shared with China's GB/T 7000.1, and the common 220 V/50 Hz single-phase environment eases design transfer, but Chinese CCC certificates are not directly transferable to the SEC file. Certification must be via an SEC-authorized body and a Chilean importer/representative is typically required. Confirm the current NCh edition and applicable Part 2 section for the luminaire type.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LED 灯具须在智利合法销售前取得 SEC 强制性产品电气安全认证（依据 NCh/IEC 60598），并具备 SEC 认证标志及 SEC 注册录入。IEC 60598-1 基础与中国 GB/T 7000.1 共用，且共用的 220 V/50 Hz 单相环境有助于设计转移，但中国 CCC 证书不可直接转用于 SEC 档案。认证须经 SEC 授权机构，且通常需要智利进口商/代表。请确认现行 NCh 版本及适用于灯具类型的第 2 部分章节。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LED 燈具須在智利合法銷售前取得 SEC 強制性產品電氣安全認證（依據 NCh/IEC 60598），並具備 SEC 認證標誌及 SEC 注冊錄入。IEC 60598-1 基礎與中國 GB/T 7000.1 共用，且共用的 220 V/50 Hz 單相環境有助於設計轉移，但中國 CCC 證書不可直接轉用於 SEC 檔案。認證須經 SEC 授權機構，且通常需要智利進口商/代表。請確認現行 NCh 版本及適用於燈具類型的第 2 部分章節。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamp / Driver Safety (NCh/IEC 62560 + IEC 61347-2-13)
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯 / 驱动器安全（NCh/IEC 62560 + IEC 61347-2-13）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈 / 驅動器安全（NCh/IEC 62560 + IEC 61347-2-13）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (retrofit bulbs) and LED control gear/drivers intended for the Chilean market are certified for safety under the SEC regime against the relevant IEC standards adopted as NCh: IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications) for retrofit LED lamps, and IEC 61347-2-13 (Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules) for drivers. These cover insulation class, dielectric strength, thermal endurance, fault conditions, and safety marking. A driver sold as a separate product is certified in its own right; when integrated into a luminaire, its safety evidence forms part of the luminaire SEC file. SEC certification by an authorized body, the SEC seal, and registry entry are required before sale.
summary.zh: 面向智利市场的自镇流 LED 灯（替换式灯泡）及 LED 控制装置/驱动器，在 SEC 制度下依据采纳为 NCh 的相关 IEC 标准认证安全：替换式 LED 灯采用 IEC 62560（普通照明用电压 > 50 V 自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），驱动器采用 IEC 61347-2-13（灯控装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求）。其涵盖绝缘等级、介电强度、热耐久性、故障条件及安全标志。作为独立产品销售的驱动器须独立认证；集成于灯具内时，其安全证据属灯具 SEC 档案的一部分。须在销售前取得 SEC 授权机构认证、SEC 认证标志及注册录入。
summary.zht: 面向智利市場的自鎮流 LED 燈（替換式燈泡）及 LED 控制裝置/驅動器，在 SEC 制度下依據採納為 NCh 的相關 IEC 標準認證安全：替換式 LED 燈採用 IEC 62560（普通照明用電壓 > 50 V 自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），驅動器採用 IEC 61347-2-13（燈控裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求）。其涵蓋絕緣等級、介電強度、熱耐久性、故障條件及安全標誌。作為獨立產品銷售的驅動器須獨立認證；集成於燈具內時，其安全證據屬燈具 SEC 檔案的一部分。須在銷售前取得 SEC 授權機構認證、SEC 認證標誌及注冊錄入。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications (adopted as NCh by INN)
IEC 61347-2-13 — Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (adopted as NCh by INN)

summary.en: China's equivalents are GB 24906-2010 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications), technically aligned with IEC 62560, and GB 19510.14-2014 (Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules), aligned with IEC 61347-2-13. CCC certification may be required for self-ballasted LED lamps and drivers in certain power/voltage ranges sold in the Chinese market. These Chinese CCC reports are specific to the CN regime and are not Chilean SEC approval documents.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用电压 > 50 V 自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），技术上与 IEC 62560 对齐，及 GB 19510.14-2014（灯的控制装置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置），与 IEC 61347-2-13 对齐。在中国市场销售的特定功率/电压范围内的自镇流 LED 灯及驱动器可能须取得 CCC 认证。这些中国 CCC 报告针对中国制度，并非智利 SEC 核准文件。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用電壓 > 50 V 自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），技術上與 IEC 62560 對齊，及 GB 19510.14-2014（燈的控制裝置——第 2-13 部分：直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置），與 IEC 61347-2-13 對齊。在中國市場銷售的特定功率/電壓範圍內的自鎮流 LED 燈及驅動器可能須取得 CCC 認證。這些中國 CCC 報告針對中國制度，並非智利 SEC 核准文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62560)
GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 61347-2-13)

gap.en: The Chilean NCh adoptions (IEC 62560, IEC 61347-2-13) and the Chinese standards (GB 24906, GB 19510.14) share the same IEC technical base, so the safety test content is largely harmonised. The gap is jurisdictional and procedural: (1) a self-ballasted LED lamp or a standalone driver must be certified under the SEC regime by an SEC-authorized body and entered in the SEC registry before sale — Chinese CCC certificates are not directly transferable, though shared IEC physics can reduce re-testing where the SEC certifier accepts the report basis; (2) confirm the exact NCh editions of IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13 in force; (3) a driver integrated into a luminaire is documented within the luminaire SEC file rather than separately. The shared 220 V single-phase / 50 Hz mains reduces electrical redesign relative to markets with different voltage/frequency.
gap.zh: 智利的 NCh 采纳（IEC 62560、IEC 61347-2-13）与中国标准（GB 24906、GB 19510.14）共用相同 IEC 技术基础，故安全检测内容基本协调。差距在于司法管辖与程序：（1）自镇流 LED 灯或独立驱动器须在销售前经 SEC 授权机构在 SEC 制度下认证并录入 SEC 注册——中国 CCC 证书不可直接转用，但在 SEC 认证机构接受报告基础时，共用 IEC 物理基础可减少重新检测；（2）确认现行 IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13 的确切 NCh 版本；（3）集成于灯具内的驱动器在灯具 SEC 档案内记录而非单独记录。共用的 220 V 单相 / 50 Hz 市电相对于电压/频率不同的市场可减少电气重新设计。
gap.zht: 智利的 NCh 採納（IEC 62560、IEC 61347-2-13）與中國標準（GB 24906、GB 19510.14）共用相同 IEC 技術基礎，故安全檢測內容基本協調。差距在於司法管轄與程序：（1）自鎮流 LED 燈或獨立驅動器須在銷售前經 SEC 授權機構在 SEC 制度下認證並錄入 SEC 注冊——中國 CCC 證書不可直接轉用，但在 SEC 認證機構接受報告基礎時，共用 IEC 物理基礎可減少重新檢測；（2）確認現行 IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13 的確切 NCh 版本；（3）集成於燈具內的驅動器在燈具 SEC 檔案內記錄而非單獨記錄。共用的 220 V 單相 / 50 Hz 市電相對於電壓/頻率不同的市場可減少電氣重新設計。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SEC certification against NCh/IEC 62560 (retrofit LED lamps) and NCh/IEC 61347-2-13 (standalone drivers) required before lawful sale in Chile; SEC seal and registry entry required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (range-dependent) — CCC may be required for self-ballasted LED lamps (GB 24906) and drivers (GB 19510.14) in certain power/voltage ranges under CNCA-C10-01

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps and standalone LED drivers require SEC certification in Chile against NCh adoptions of IEC 62560 and IEC 61347-2-13 respectively, with the SEC seal and registry entry before sale. The IEC base is shared with China's GB 24906 and GB 19510.14, so the safety test content is largely harmonised, but Chinese CCC certificates are not directly transferable to the SEC file. A driver integrated into a luminaire is documented within the luminaire SEC file. Confirm the current NCh editions and route via an SEC-authorized certifier and Chilean importer/representative.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 自镇流 LED 灯及独立 LED 驱动器在智利分别须依据 IEC 62560 及 IEC 61347-2-13 的 NCh 采纳版取得 SEC 认证，并在销售前具备 SEC 认证标志及注册录入。IEC 基础与中国 GB 24906 及 GB 19510.14 共用，故安全检测内容基本协调，但中国 CCC 证书不可直接转用于 SEC 档案。集成于灯具内的驱动器在灯具 SEC 档案内记录。请确认现行 NCh 版本，并经 SEC 授权认证机构及智利进口商/代表办理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 自鎮流 LED 燈及獨立 LED 驅動器在智利分別須依據 IEC 62560 及 IEC 61347-2-13 的 NCh 採納版取得 SEC 認證，並在銷售前具備 SEC 認證標誌及注冊錄入。IEC 基礎與中國 GB 24906 及 GB 19510.14 共用，故安全檢測內容基本協調，但中國 CCC 證書不可直接轉用於 SEC 檔案。集成於燈具內的驅動器在燈具 SEC 檔案內記錄。請確認現行 NCh 版本，並經 SEC 授權認證機構及智利進口商/代表辦理。
